entity.summary: Centralized digital-asset exchange offering spot, margin, futures, copy trading, crypto purchases, earn products, order-book markets, mobile access, and REST and WebSocket APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party Hotcoin pages expose spot, margin, futures, copy trading, buy-crypto, earn, order-book trading, mobile applications, and API access. The homepage states that Hotcoin was founded in 2017; no synthetic exact launch day is assigned here.

evidence.title: Hotcoin official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform exposes Buy Crypto, Markets, Spot, Margin, Futures, Copy Trading, Earn, mobile applications, API access, and active trading entry points.

evidence.title: Hotcoin Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party platform introduction identifies Hotcoin as a global crypto exchange and documents spot trading, C2C transactions, derivatives, crypto finance, loans, and global operations.

evidence.title: Hotcoin API
evidence.notes: Current first-party API surface documents spot and leverage APIs, perpetual futures APIs, market and account data, trading actions, and WebSocket feeds.
